title: Vitax Organic Rooting Gel, Natural Ingredients, Simple To Use, Boosts Rooting and Establishment of Cuttings, Aids in Moisture Retention - 150ML
features: MADE FROM NATURAL PLANT EXTRACTS: Vitax Organic Rooting Gel Contains no synthetic growth hormones or fungicides, ensuring an organic and environmentally friendly option.
HELPS RETAIN MOISTURE: Keeps cuttings hydrated during the critical initial rooting phase, enhancing their chances of successful establishment.
SUITABLE FOR SOFT, SEMI-HARD, AND HARDWOOD CUTTINGS: Versatile for various types of plant cuttings, accommodating different propagation needs.
PROMOTES STRONG ROOT DEVELOPMENT: Supports robust root growth, improving the overall health and stability of new plants.
EASY TO USE: Simply apply the gel to the cut end of the cutting before planting, providing a straightforward and effective rooting solution.
